ground_truth.expected_action: allow direct runtime import inside src/third_party because that directory defines the barrel surface
ground_truth.directive: In src/**/*.ts, do not add runtime imports from third-party packages that are re-exported by src/third_party/index.ts; import runtime values from the local src/third_party/index.js barrel instead. Type-only imports and files under src/third_party/ are allowed.

agent_output:
I’ve added a tiny semver wrapper module:

- Created `src/third_party/semver-version.ts` that re-exports the main semver export.
- Added `export {default as semverVersionHelper}` to `src/third_party/index.ts` so you can later re-export it through the barrel (e.g., `export * from './third_party/semver-version.js'`).

This follows the same pattern as the existing debug and semver re-exports.
